languages.text: Если бы не слуги династии, вставшие нерушимым щитом между нами и некронами, вряд ли хоть кто-то из нас остался бы в живых. Уцелеть удалось лишь единицам — но, вопреки судьбе, вопреки всей чудовищной силе врага, я и потомок остались невредимы.
languages.translation_comment: Гибнут все, кроме свиты, РТ и Себериана. — к боеспособности.
Гибнут все, кроме свиты, РТ и Себериана. — к боеспособности.

languages.text: Were it not for the dynasty's servants forming an impenetrable shield between us and the Necrons, I doubt any of us would have been left alive. Only a handful survived — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.
languages.original_text: Если бы не слуги династии, вставшие нерушимым щитом между нами и некронами, вряд ли хоть кто-то из нас остался бы в живых. Уцелеть удалось лишь единицам — но, вопреки судьбе, вопреки всей чудовищной силе врага, я и потомок остались невредимы.

traits.locale_text: Were it not for the dynasty's servants forming an impenetrable shield between us and the Necrons, I doubt any of us would have been left alive. Only a handful survived — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

Were it not for the dynasty's servants forming an impenetrable shield between us and the Necrons, I doubt any of us would have been left alive. Only a handful survived — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

Repelling the strange creations while also destroying the sphere's guardians was an almost impossible task. Superheated plasma burned crude holes in the xenos' serpentine bodies, but it also landed on what they were guarding. Cracks appeared wherever the shots had touched the crystal and began rapidly widening.

Were it not for the dynasty's servants forming an impenetrable shield between us and the Necrons, I doubt any of us would have been left alive. Only a handful survived — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

Were it not for the dynasty's servants forming an impenetrable shield between us and the Necrons, I doubt any of us would have been left alive. Only a handful survived — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

languages.text: 若没有王朝仆从在我们与太空死灵之间筑起的坚实屏障，恐怕我们早已全军覆没。只有极少数人幸存。即便如此，我与继承人依然违逆了必死的宿命，挫败了那骇人强敌的必杀之局。
languages.original_text: Were it not for the dynasty's servants forming an impenetrable shield between us and the Necrons, I doubt any of us would have been left alive. Only a handful survived — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

traits.locale_text: 若没有王朝仆从在我们与太空死灵之间筑起的坚实屏障，恐怕我们早已全军覆没。只有极少数人幸存。即便如此，我与继承人依然违逆了必死的宿命，挫败了那骇人强敌的必杀之局。

languages.text: De no ser por el escudo viviente que los sirvientes de la dinastía formaron entre los Necrones y nosotros, dudo que nadie hubiera sobrevivido. Solo quedamos unos pocos, pero, desafiando al destino y frustrando a nuestro poderoso adversario, mi hereder{mf|o|a} y yo salimos ilesos.
languages.original_text: Were it not for the dynasty's servants forming an impenetrable shield between us and the Necrons, I doubt any of us would have been left alive. Only a handful survived — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

traits.locale_text: De no ser por el escudo viviente que los sirvientes de la dinastía formaron entre los Necrones y nosotros, dudo que nadie hubiera sobrevivido. Solo quedamos unos pocos, pero, desafiando al destino y frustrando a nuestro poderoso adversario, mi hereder{mf|o|a} y yo salimos ilesos».

languages.text: Si ces serviteurs de la dynastie n'avaient pas formé un bouclier impénétrable entre nous et les Nécrons, je doute qu'il y aurait eu le moindre survivant. Seule une poignée parvint à s'en sortir, dont mon {mf|héritier|héritière} et moi-même, défiant le destin et déjouant cet ennemi d'une puissance incommensurable.
languages.original_text: Were it not for the dynasty's servants forming an impenetrable shield between us and the Necrons, I doubt any of us would have been left alive. Only a handful survived — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

traits.locale_text: Si ces serviteurs de la dynastie n'avaient pas formé un bouclier impénétrable entre nous et les Nécrons, je doute qu'il y aurait eu le moindre survivant. Seule une poignée parvint à s'en sortir, dont mon {mf|héritier|héritière} et moi-même, défiant le destin et déjouant cet ennemi d'une puissance incommensurable.

languages.text: Hanedanlığın hizmetkârları bizimle Nekronlar arasında aşılmaz bir kalkan oluşturmasaydı hiçbirimizin hayatta kalabileceğini sanmıyorum. Sadece bir avuç insan hayatta kaldı... Yine de kadere meydan okuyan ve o korkunç derecede güçlü düşmanımızı hüsrana uğratan vârisim ve ben, yara almadan kurtulduk.
languages.original_text: Were it not for the dynasty's servants forming an impenetrable shield between us and the Necrons, I doubt any of us would have been left alive. Only a handful survived — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

traits.locale_text: Hanedanlığın hizmetkârları bizimle Nekronlar arasında aşılmaz bir kalkan oluşturmasaydı hiçbirimizin hayatta kalabileceğini sanmıyorum. Sadece bir avuç insan hayatta kaldı... Yine de kadere meydan okuyan ve o korkunç derecede güçlü düşmanımızı hüsrana uğratan vârisim ve ben, yara almadan kurtulduk.

languages.text: Hätten die Diener der Dynastie nicht einen undurchdringlichen Schild zwischen uns und den Necrons gebildet, hätte wohl keiner von uns überlebt. Nur eine Handvoll unserer Leute überlebte ... aber allen Gefahren zum Trotz besiegten {mf|mein Erbe|meine Erbin} und ich unseren monströsen Feind und blieben unversehrt.
languages.original_text: Were it not for the dynasty's servants forming an impenetrable shield between us and the Necrons, I doubt any of us would have been left alive. Only a handful survived — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

traits.locale_text: Hätten die Diener der Dynastie nicht einen undurchdringlichen Schild zwischen uns und den Necrons gebildet, hätte wohl keiner von uns überlebt. Nur eine Handvoll unserer Leute überlebte ... aber allen Gefahren zum Trotz besiegten {mf|mein Erbe|meine Erbin} und ich unseren monströsen Feind und blieben unversehrt.

languages.text: 奇妙な生き物を退けつつ、球体の守護者も破壊するという、ほぼ不可能な任務。過熱したプラズマが異形の蛇のような体へ粗い穴を開け、しかし同時に守護していたものにも当たった。射撃を受けた水晶は亀裂が入り、急速に広がっていく。
languages.original_text: Repelling the strange creations while also destroying the sphere's guardians was an almost impossible task. Superheated plasma burned crude holes in the xenos' serpentine bodies, but it also landed on what they were guarding. Cracks appeared wherever the shots had touched the crystal and began rapidly widening.

traits.locale_text: 奇妙な生き物を退けつつ、球体の守護者も破壊するという、ほぼ不可能な任務。過熱したプラズマが異形の蛇のような体へ粗い穴を開け、しかし同時に守護していたものにも当たった。射撃を受けた水晶は亀裂が入り、急速に広がっていく。
